name: is.zori.unity-clap-router
description: C# P/Invoke bindings and Unity surface over the clap-ipc-client C ABI. Drives a CLAP plugin host across an arm's-length IPC seam: a blittable MrEvent mirror, the MusicRouterSession conductor surface (graph control + realtime event push), a seeded composer, and the PlayMode batchmode demo gate. Links zero CLAP/GPL code.
